632 Brhai Samhitd

For increasing the yield of flowers and fruits of trees, creepers
and shrubs, they should be sprinkled constantly with a mixture of
an Sdhaka (64 Palas) of the powder of the dung of goats as well as of
sheep, one ddhaka of sesamum powder, a prastha (16 Palas) of wheat
particles, a Tula (100 Palas) of beef and a Drona (256 Palas) of
water kept for seven nights. (This is the measure for one tree).
[The commentator quotes the following verses from some text
explaining the different weights and measures :
